Talk to us
Legal

Privacy

We collect very little, and only to respond to you. This page explains what and why.

Last updated: 2 July 2026

What we collect

If you use our contact form or email us, we receive the details you choose to provide: your name, company, job title, email address, and message. We do not sell or rent this information, and we do not use it for advertising.

How we use it

We use what you send only to respond to your enquiry and, where relevant, to discuss a potential engagement. Communications are treated as confidential.

Cookies and consent

We use CookieYes to manage cookie consent. Non-essential cookies and the tools described below load only after you accept the relevant category (Analytics or Marketing) in the cookie banner. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time using the "Cookie Settings" link in the footer of every page.

Analytics

We use Vercel Web Analytics and Speed Insights, which are cookieless and collect aggregated, anonymised usage and performance data. With your Analytics consent we also use Microsoft Clarity, which shows us how the site is used through heatmaps and session replays, with typed input masked. We use this to understand interest from prospective clients and to improve the site. We do not sell this data.

Visitor identification

With your Analytics consent we use Leadfeeder, which identifies the companies visiting our site, including form submissions, so we can understand which firms are interested in our services. With your Marketing consent we use RB2B, a visitor identification service. The following disclosure applies to RB2B:

When you visit or log in to our website, cookies and similar technologies may be used by our online data partners or vendors to associate these activities with other personal information they or others have about you, including by association with your email. We (or service providers on our behalf) may then send communications and marketing to these email addresses. You may opt out of receiving this advertising by visiting https://app.retention.com/optout. You also have the option to opt out of the collection of your personal data in compliance with GDPR by visiting https://www.rb2b.com/rb2b-gdpr-opt-out.

Opting out and deletion

You can decline or withdraw consent at any time via the Cookie Settings link, and the RB2B opt-out links above apply to that service specifically. For any question or deletion request about data collected through this site, email info@navexcapital.com and we will act promptly.

Data retention

We keep enquiry correspondence only as long as needed for the conversation it relates to, or as required by law, and then delete it.

Your rights

You can ask us what information we hold about you, or ask us to correct or delete it, at any time. Contact us and we will act on reasonable requests promptly.

Contact

Privacy questions can be sent to info@navexcapital.com.

Navex Capital

Operator-led maritime, transport & logistics advisory for private equity and business owners.
